thank holy living christ i'm not a chick

We'll get the notes we scrawled during the 28-hour labor down soon, but in the end all that matters is that our healthy boy was born today. Vital stats include:

  • Time: 10:39 pm exit
  • Weight: 7 lb. 8 oz.
  • Length: 20 in.
  • Name: Jaden Orion Berkeley McDonald Peltier Yu.

Jen was amazing. She got that look that Ah-nold got in "Total Recall" when he (Doug Quaid) got strapped in the memory-reprogramming machine and that beany technician smacked him- complete concentration and determination. Of course, in Jen's case it was to get the baby out instead of escaping, breaking bones of nearby guards and scientists, and carrying out Coatl's plan to start the reactor and free Mars. Though if Jen were Quaid, that would make me, the spouse, Sharon Stone! Wow, isn't that an entertaining thought.

Here are some pics (click on the pic to get a larger pic)... on the pic to get a larger pic)...

(More pics on the way.)
